title: Container
summary: The container object (.o-container) controls readable content width, horizontal centering, and spacing.

description.main: Use .o-container as the outer wrapper for page sections. Apply modifier classes to adjust width behavior for specific layout needs.

attributes.class: The base class and optional modifiers for container behavior.

description.heading: Default container
description.description: Standard centered container with default spacing.

description.heading: Wide container
description.description: Expanded container width while preserving centered layout flow.

description.heading: Fullwidth container
description.description: Edge-to-edge container that spans the full viewport width.
